summary: Phase 6E Notifications + Resend — Backend 7/7 pytest PASS + Frontend e2e PASS. Verified: GET /notifications empty, unread-count=0, GET /preferences default keys, PATCH /preferences persists, POST /send-test propagates Resend 403 sandbox error as 500 with explicit message, POST /team/invitations exposes email_sent/email_error and creates invite in DB despite Resend failure (cleaned up after). Frontend: bell shows no badge + 'Aucune notification' dropdown; /settings?tab=notifications shows 5 rows + toggles, toggle flip works, save → green feedback, send-test → red feedback with exact Resend message. No '6E' badge on sidebar Notifications tab (Calendrier still shows '6C').
critical_code_review_comments: modules/notifications/index.js — send-test propagates Resend error via 500 (good). The status code 500 for a downstream-policy error (Resend 403 sandbox) is technically a category mismatch; a 502/422 would be more semantically correct, but functionally it propagates the explicit error message which is what matters here. Acceptable for sandbox phase.

modules/notifications/index.js — notify() and notifyCompany()/notifyAdmins() use service_role key + no tenant guard, so any caller with a valid req.user.id can in principle dispatch. They are internal helpers (not exposed as routes) so risk is limited; still worth flagging for Phase 8 hardening.

modules/notifications/index.js — PATCH /preferences does NOT validate that booleans are actually booleans (e.g. ticket_email='yes' would be upserted as-is). Pydantic-style validation would harden the endpoint. Minor.

modules/notifications/index.js — getUnreadCount() is called inside list endpoint after the main query, so we pay an extra round-trip on every list call. Could be merged into a single query for perf. Minor.
modules/team/index.js — Resend email send is best-effort (try/catch returns email_error string). Good pattern: invitation row is preserved even when Resend fails. Verified by pytest (cleanup needed).
Frontend NotificationsTab.jsx — feedback auto-clears after 5s (save) / 8s (send-test). Good UX. Toggle component uses aria-checked + role='switch' for a11y.

Frontend NotificationsTab.jsx — `setPrefs((p) => ({ ...p, [\`${cat}_email\`]: !p[\`${cat}_email\`] }))` assumes prefs is a non-null object. The useEffect sets prefs to `d.preferences || {}` which is always an object → safe.
Frontend NotificationBell.jsx — polls unread-count every 30s via setInterval. Could waste battery for inactive tabs; consider Visibility API. Minor.

Frontend NotificationsTab.jsx — when send-test returns a long Resend message, the entire raw English string is shown in the feedback (no i18n fallback). For Phase 7 the message should be translated/wrapped: 'Resend en mode sandbox — vérifiez un domaine sur resend.com/domains.' Minor UX nit.
test_credentials: qa-bot@garage-tremblay.test / QaBot_Test_2026! (company_admin, company_id af5f079f-6fc2-4d70-8c8d-51d83d301906). super_admin contact@exevori.com JAMAIS touché.
seed_data_creation: Test 'test_team_invitation_returns_email_sent_and_email_error' crée une invitation (qa-bot-invite-test@garage-tremblay.test) puis la supprime via Supabase REST DELETE (service_role) dans finally. Vérifié: pas de résidu en DB. Le PATCH /preferences persiste l'état modifié pour qa-bot (ticket_email=false, billing_email=true, draft_email=true, learning_email=false, system_email=true) — c'est intentionnel et compatible avec les futures runs (le test ne réinitialise pas, mais accepte n'importe quel boolean en GET initial).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 6E vert. Tests pytest: tests/test_notifications_phase_6e.py (7 cases, 2.5s). Frontend e2e: login qa-bot → /settings?tab=notifications → 5 toggles avec data-testid='notif-row-{cat}' et 'notif-toggle-{cat}' (cat ∈ ticket, billing, draft, learning, system) + bouton 'notif-save-button' (vert success) + bouton 'notif-send-test-button' (rouge sandbox 'You can only send testing emails…'). Sidebar Notifications n'a PAS de badge (phase: null dans Settings.jsx ligne 40). NotificationBell affiche pas de badge rouge quand unread_count=0 et 'Aucune notification' dans le dropdown vide. POINT IMPORTANT: send-test renvoie 500 (pas 403) car le backend wrap l'erreur Resend en 500 — c'est par design. Le message Resend brut est propagé dans body.error et affiché tel quel en français/anglais sur l'UI. Phase 6C (Calendrier) toujours skipped.
rca of the issue: N/A — aucune issue détectée. Tous les comportements attendus (y compris l'échec sandbox de Resend) sont correctement propagés et affichés.
